title: Part 3 – Conversation : réservation hôtel pour voyage d'affaires
instructions: Écoutez la conversation, puis répondez aux trois questions.
audioText: Man: I'm trying to book a hotel for my trip to Lyon next week, but the one on our approved vendor list is fully booked. Woman: That's a problem. Have you checked with the travel office? They might have a corporate rate at another hotel. Man: Not yet. I didn't know we had a travel office. Woman: Yes, just call extension 214. They handle all business travel bookings. They can usually find something within budget. Man: Great, I'll call them now. Do I need to get manager approval before booking? Woman: Only if the hotel costs more than 150 euros per night. Otherwise you can proceed directly.

questions.prompt: What problem is the man facing?
choices: His preferred hotel is fully booked
questions.explanation: "the one on our approved vendor list is fully booked".

questions.prompt: What does the woman suggest the man do?
choices: Contact the travel office at extension 214
Ask his manager to book for him
questions.explanation: "just call extension 214. They handle all business travel bookings".

questions.prompt: When does the man need manager approval for a hotel?
choices: Only if the hotel costs more than 150 euros per night
questions.explanation: "Only if the hotel costs more than 150 euros per night".
